title: Create:Gearshift
description: This is just a modpack for the Create:Gearshift SMP
body:
Welcome to Create:Gearshift, the official modpack for the Create Mod SMP of the same name! Designed from the ground up to elevate your mechanical creativity, this pack focuses on expanding the possibilities of the Create mod, while keeping performance smooth and the experience immersive.

🔧 Core Features:

Powered by the Create mod – automate, build, and innovate using gears, belts, and steam power.

Carefully selected compatibility and QoL mods to enhance Create without bloating the experience.

Multiplayer-optimized for seamless collaboration, epic contraptions, and large-scale community  builds.
